sections.paragraph:
(“to whom God is help”), pr.n.m., Eliezer.-

(1) a man of Damascus whom Abraham intended to be his heir before the birth of Isaac [of Ishmael], Gen 15:2 according to verse Gen 15:3, born in his house.-(2) a son of Moses, Exo 18:4.-(3) 1Ch 7:8.-(4) 1Ch 27:16.-(5) 1Ch 15:24.-(6) 2Ch 20:37.-(7) , (8) , (9) Ezr 8:16 10:18 , 23 Ezr 10:23, 31 Ezr 10:31.
